Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 23 

information from MMA files with other sources of dual eligibility information, including data 
submitted by Puerto Rico and other U.S. territories, and plan transaction data from the Medicare 
Advantage/Prescription Drug System (MARx). 

Dual eligibles are often divided into “full duals” and “partial duals” based on the level of Medicaid 
benefits they receive.
